docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEATHRIGHT 360 DOING BUSINESS AS WALDEN HOUSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, RUSHNELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HEATHRIGHT 360 DOING BUSINESS AS WALDEN HOUSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED FEB-11-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEATHRIGHT 360 DOING BUSINESS AS WALDEN HOUSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, RUSHNELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DENISE WILLIAMS AND JEAN FLORE--EMPLOYEES. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, RUSHNELL AS TO DEFENDANT HEATHRIGHT 360 DOING BUSINESS AS WALDEN HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
